title: Format ConfigLoadError for people
scenario: Typed errors are for programs; Display provides stable human-readable messages at the boundary.
instructions: Implement Display for ConfigLoadError with one concise message per variant.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps config-err-display explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
